DAX Expression:
CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'),
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Student Current Status] = "ACTIVE"
)

CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'),
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Student Current Status] = "ACTIVE",
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Ready for Placement] = "READY"
)

VAR ReadyStudents = [Students Ready for Placement]
VAR ActiveStudents = [Total Active Students]
RETURN
IF(
    ISBLANK(ReadyStudents) || ISBLANK(ActiveStudents),
    0,
    DIVIDE(ReadyStudents, ActiveStudents, 0) * 100
)

CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'),
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[PlacementY/N?] = "YES"
)

CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'),
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Student Current Status] = "ACTIVE",
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Ready for Placement] = "READY"
)

VAR Result = DIVIDE(
    [Students Placed],
    [Students Eligible for Placement],
    0
) * 100
RETURN
IF(ISBLANK(Result), 0, Result)

VAR _Rate = [Current Placement Rate]
VAR _Placed = [Students Placed]
VAR _Eligible = [Students Eligible for Placement]
VAR _Benchmark = 80
VAR _Gap = _Rate - _Benchmark
VAR _Icon = 
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        _Rate >= _Benchmark, "🟢",
        _Rate >= 70, "🟡",
        "🔴"
    )
VAR _GapText = 
    IF(
        _Gap >= 0,
        " (+" & FORMAT(_Gap, "0.0") & "% vs goal)",
        " (" & FORMAT(_Gap, "0.0") & "% vs goal)"
    )
RETURN
    IF(
        _Eligible = 0,
        "No Students Ready",
        _Icon & " " & FORMAT(_Rate, "0.0") & "%" & UNICHAR(10) &
        _Placed & " of " & _Eligible & " placed" & UNICHAR(10) &
        "Goal: " & _Benchmark & "%" & _GapText
    )

VAR CurrentStage = SELECTEDVALUE('Stages'[Stage]) 
RETURN 
SWITCH( 
    CurrentStage, 
    "Enrolled", [Total Active Students], 
    "Onboarded", [Onboarded], 
    "Soft Skills Complete", [Soft Skills Complete], 
    "ABCI Workshops", [ABCI Workshops], 
    "Industry Certs", [Industry Certs], 
    "Ready for Placement", [Rdy for Placement], 
    "Placed", [Placed], 
  BLANK() 
)

CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'),
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Onboard Complete(i.e. All Platforms, All State Docs)] = "COMPLETE"
)

DIVIDE(
    [Students Onboarded],
    [Total Active Students],
    0
) * 100

VAR _Rate = [Onboarding Completion Rate]
VAR _Onboarded = [Students Onboarded]
VAR _Total = [Total Active Students]
VAR _Icon = 
    SWITCH(
        TRUE(),
        _Rate >= 90, "🟢",
        _Rate >= 75, "🟡",
        _Rate > 0, "🔴",
        "⚪"
    )
RETURN
    IF(
        _Total = 0,
        "No active students",
        _Icon & " " & FORMAT(_Rate, "0.0") & "%" & UNICHAR(10) &
        _Onboarded & " of " & _Total
    )

CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'),
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Badge Credentials Completed] >= 1,
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Student Current Status] = "ACTIVE"
)

CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'),
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Soft Skills Curriculum Completed] = "COMPLETE",
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Badge Credentials Completed] >= 1,
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[ABCI Workshops Completed] = "COMPLETE",
    'FY 25-26 CURRENT DATA'[Student Current Status] = "ACTIVE"
)

DIVIDE(
    SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[YTD_Actuals]) / 12, 
    SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Budget_Total]) / 12, 
    0
) * 100

DIVIDE(
    SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Variance]), 
    SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Monthly_Budget]), 
    0
) * 100

CALCULATE(
    SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[YTD_Actuals]) / 12, 
    Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Category] = "EXPENSE"
)

CALCULATE(
    SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[YTD_Actuals]) / 12, 
    Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Category] = "REVENUE"
)
[Total Revenue YTD] - [Total Expenses YTD]
SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Budget_Total]) / 12
[Total Budget] - ([Total Expenses YTD] + [Total Revenue YTD])

CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Account_Number]),
    Budget_Tracker_Normalized[YTD_Actuals] > Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Budget_Total]
)
SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Total_Funding_Budget]) / 12
SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Budget_Variance]) / 12

DIVIDE(
    SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Budget_Variance]) / 12, 
    SUM(Budget_Tracker_Normalized[Budget_Total]) / 12,

) * 100
